response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP. Demonstrates strong engineering discipline (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and a track record of end-to-end ownership across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Postgres experience, but the breadth and adaptability suggest these are learnable quickly.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack delivery across TypeScript/Node, React, and cloud (AWS) with production scale
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matching a key required skill
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, open-source maintainer
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
No demonstrated Kotlin/Java backend work in recent roles (Java only briefly years ago)
PostgreSQL experience not shown; database work centered on MongoDB and MySQL
